metadata.title: Synthetic Research Release Traceability
metadata.purpose: Document evidence, validation, and human-review gates for an offline research artifact.
metadata.monitoring_plan: Review source currency, validation status, subgroup evidence, and unresolved issues at each version.
metadata.retirement_criteria: Retire when sources, validation evidence, ownership, or intended use are obsolete.

intended_use: Research/governance traceability only; not for patient care or live clinical use.
prohibited_uses: No diagnosis, treatment recommendation, dosing, triage, urgency, alarm, or autonomous decision.
No care pathway, EHR rule, or executable clinical logic.
No claim of authorization or compliance.
limitations: The matrix documents plain-language logic and does not execute it.
Source presence does not establish evidence quality.
Human review and independent validation remain required.

nodes.precondition: An evidence record is proposed for the research artifact.
nodes.logic_statement: Check for a stable citation, source version, and retrieval date.
nodes.output_value: missing_source_provenance when any required source field is absent
validation_tests: Complete source fields produce no provenance flag.

nodes.logic_statement: Check whether independent external validation and subgroup uncertainty are documented.
nodes.output_value: true when required validation documentation is absent
nodes.rationale: Transportability claims require independent evidence and uncertainty.
validation_tests: Missing external-validation evidence produces a release hold.
Complete validation evidence passes to human review.

nodes.logic_statement: Require recorded review by the accountable method, domain, privacy, and governance roles.
nodes.output_value: pending until all accountable review roles record a decision
nodes.rationale: Automated structural checks cannot approve a research artifact.
validation_tests: Absent reviewer decision produces pending status.
Recorded reviewer decisions produce complete documentation status.

human_review.approval_boundary: Only the accountable organization can approve a research artifact; this matrix never authorizes clinical use.
